title: Wrap That
lyrics: If you see me again, know I'm winnin', know I'm winnin' If you see me again, yeah, I'm winnin', baby Light comes down and I know, oh, oh, yeah It all gets the way you feel inside tonight If you see me again, you better recognize I'm what you want, baby, I'm what you need, yeah If you see me again, you better be down and Get on your knees and Give me, give me that love that you wanna give me Give me that hug that you wanna give me Stop findin' the feelin' that you fight, fight, fight me every night Stop feelin' the feelin's that you're feelin' No way, no way I know that we can be better If you just come and follow me, yeah Land it, it's just me, it's, it's me It's just a question that we can see friendly Friend, foe, it don't even matter though But you ain't a ho, even though you go down low Yeah, down low It's just a little bit of a, of a thought with me It's just a different family and a family tree Take it to the bop, bop, bop, bop with me And take a little dip, dip, dip with me Come on, dip, come on, jump Left to the right, yeah, come on, hump Come on, dip, come on, jump Left to the right, baby, come on down with you, uh Feelin' that shit Feelin' that stuff that I don't think we can Ever let me hit, no, yeah Yeah, fuckin' my mind up Got a girl that's a right girl, yeah Just family based and a family waste of Hint to me, it's just better just to run around with me It's just better just to come and crown with me Get up and get down, don't forget where you come from Oh, no, oh, oh, just a little rub with me Just a little fuck with me, just a little feel with me Spend a band with you, baby, come on We can get down, what you think about that, girl? Think about that when you're comin' in, clap to rap Drop it down and make a clap for me Drop it down and make a half for me Make yourself look like you are a million dollars I see past that light inside ya You're beautiful, yeah, what's behind ya? Hmm, nigga
